args.code:
import pandas as pd
business_data = locals()['var_function-call-14679926647268039419']['results']
review_data = locals()['var_function-call-7037228154402514064']['results']

df_business = pd.DataFrame(business_data)
df_review = pd.DataFrame(review_data)

df_review['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df_review['rating'])

df_merged = pd.merge(df_business, df_review, on='gmap_id')

average_ratings = df_merged.groupby('name')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
average_ratings_sorted = average_ratings.sort_values(by='rating', ascending=False)

top_5_businesses = average_ratings_sorted.head(5)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(top_5_businesses.to_json(orient='records'))
